# Norma

This repo defines the **Norma** web design standard (a reference for humans and AI).

- Design rules: `standard/rules.yaml` → `standard/rules.json`. Tokens: `standard/tokens.tokens.json`.
- Agent behaviour: follow `AGENTS.md` (generated from `agents/norma-design-agent.md`).
- Before committing UI changes, run `npm run lint:self` and `npm run check:drift`.
- To change a rule: edit `standard/rules.yaml` (or `agents/norma-design-agent.md`), then `npm run build:rules && npm run gen`. Never hand-edit generated files.
